items.prompt: Should a nonprofit focus on short-term shelter for homeless people even if it leaves less money for job training programs?

The optimal approach likely involves both services calibrated to community needs, rather than choosing one at the expense of the other. Context matters enormously (local employment rates, shelter availability from other sources, target population demographics).
